cities.name: New York City
cities.local_context: Fast-paced; people often appreciate directness and not wasting their time.

cities.name: Los Angeles
cities.local_context: Spread out; car culture means plans often need more lead time.

cities.name: San Francisco
cities.local_context: Tech-heavy population; smaller and more insular social scene.

cities.name: Houston
cities.local_context: Very spread out; a lot of socializing centers on food.

cities.name: Salt Lake City
cities.local_context: Outdoorsy culture; a mix of nightlife and more low-key daytime social scenes.

cities.name: Miami
cities.local_context: Nightlife-heavy; a lot of social activity happens late.
